name: Trigger Agent
description: Triggers the agent's transition loop. Starts the run cycle whether or not there is pending work — the agent may act proactively based on its prompt. When no tasks or messages are pending, the agent receives a clear signal and can choose to act or report idle. By default waits for the run cycle to complete. Set wait=false to return immediately, or wait=<ms> for a timeout.

wait.description: Wait policy: true (default, block until done), false (return immediately), or integer milliseconds (timeout)

status.description: Agent status: SLEEPING (completed) or RUNNING (if wait=false or timed out)

result.description: Result returned by the transition function (only when waited)
